Plan: write custom block elements for stride-2 SFPU pattern (i*2/i*2+1). For bcast variants migrate inner BlockSize=num_tiles_per_cycle BlockBinaryFpu+BlockPackTile, with NoWaitNoPop for bcast operand. Skip ternary kernels with bcast staging interleaved (no clean chain-shaped stage). Skip where_* kernels with TTS/TST FILL_LLK conditional logic.
Surveyed reduction/, moreh/, ccl/ kernels. Most use _with_dt patterns + bcast + mask + held-DEST + power_tile_to_cb + multi-stage CB pipelines. Need to find chain-shaped sub-blocks.

Most CCL/transformer kernels skip due to acquire_dst, multi-stage, matmul, welford, l1_acc, or non-block-iter indexes. Best candidates: bcast_to (all 3), ssm_prefix_scan (mul/sum/copy helpers), conv3d (add_block_inplace, add_bias_inplace), rmsnorm_post_allgather (rsqrt block, beta block)

Identified 3 clean partials: layer_norm_small rsqrt(var+eps), layer_norm_large rsqrt, clip_grad_norm_step3 bcast_scalar mul. Other targets either fully *_to_cb helpers, mid-loop mask, or in-place CB recurrence.
